name: Appian Low-Code BPM & Process Automation API
what_it_does: Appian REST API for low-code BPM and process automation platform. Enables AI agents to trigger and manage process workflows and case management, handle form data submission and record management, access task assignment and approval workflow automation, retrieve process analytics and audit trail data, manage RPA bot task integration, handle AI decisioning and ML model integration, access document and content management workflows, retrieve user and group management data, manage process design and deployment via API, and integrate Appian workflows with external systems and data sources.
use_cases: Triggering process workflows and case management from enterprise automation agents
Managing task approval and routing from workflow orchestration agents
Accessing process analytics and audit data from process intelligence agents
Integrating Appian workflows with external systems from enterprise integration agents
not_for: Consumer application development without enterprise BPM requirements
Simple CRUD applications without complex workflow and process orchestration
High-throughput data processing without human-in-the-loop workflow needs
best_when: An enterprise using Appian for BPM, case management, or regulated workflows wants AI agents to automate process triggering, task management, approval routing, document handling, and analytics integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Appian is used for regulated process automation (FDA, financial compliance, government). Automated process triggering must maintain audit trail integrity. Case management automation in sensitive domains (legal, healthcare, financial) requires authorization controls and human oversight for critical decisions.

auth.notes: Appian uses API keys and OAuth 2.0 for REST API access. User and service account credentials with process, record, and form scopes. Comprehensive documentation in Appian Community. Webhooks for process event notifications. Strong government and regulated industry presence (FedRAMP authorized).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise BPM subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user subscription; community and full user types; cloud and on-premises
pricing.notes: McLean, Virginia. NASDAQ: APPN. Founded 1999. Enterprise low-code BPM platform. $500M+ annual revenue. Used by US DoD, FDA, financial services, and healthcare. FedRAMP authorized. Strong in regulated industries and government. Appian AI built-in. Competes with Pega and ServiceNow for BPM and case management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA with FedRAMP cloud

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Used for FDA/DoD/financial regulated processes — automated triggering must maintain audit trail integrity
Process design is done in low-code UI — API is for execution, not design; AI cannot dynamically create processes
No public MCP server — API key/OAuth REST API with Appian Community documentation
FedRAMP High authorization — government customers have additional security and access requirements
Record system updates via API affect Appian data fabric — data model changes require platform coordination
RPA integration adds complexity — bot credentials and access require separate management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise BPM and case management data. FedRAMP High, SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/FedRAMP data residency. Regulated process audit trail sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BPM data. FedRAMP High, SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/FedRAMP. Regulated process and case data.
